bodyContent:
7 Conversion Killers on Healthcare Websites
Kevin
March 5, 2026 
No Comments
Healthcare websites often lose potential patients due to preventable design and usability mistakes. Learn the seven most common conversion killers and how to fix them.
Read more

images.alt: Medical practice front desk showing the operational complexity of managing patient flow and scheduling
Reggie, the dog who inspired the RegTek name and keeps the founder company during long work sessions
Diagram illustrating the difference between marketing leads and actual scheduled healthcare appointments
